mapper.sql: w.id, w.rule_id AS ruleId, w.member_id AS memberId, w.benefit_id AS benefitId, w.coach_id AS coachId, w.store_id AS storeId, w.product_id AS productId, w.remaining_lessons AS remainingLessons, w.remaining_days AS remainingDays, w.warning_type AS warningType, w.follow_status AS followStatus, w.follow_remark AS followRemark, DATE_FORMAT(w.first_warning_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS firstWarningAt, DATE_FORMAT(w.last_warning_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastWarningAt, DATE_FORMAT(w.closed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS closedAt, (SELECT nickname FROM user_info WHERE userId = w.member_id) AS memberName, (SELECT phone FROM user_info WHERE userId = w.member_id) AS memberMobile, (SELECT coach_name FROM pt_coach WHERE id = w.coach_id) AS coachName, (SELECT storeName FROM store WHERE storeId = w.store_id) AS storeName, (SELECT product_name FROM pt_product WHERE id = w.product_id) AS productName

sql.if: AND w.member_id IN (SELECT userId FROM user_info WHERE nickname LIKE concat('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE concat('%', #{memberKeyword}, '%'))
AND w.coach_id IN (SELECT id FROM pt_coach WHERE coach_name LIKE concat('%', #{coachName}, '%'))

mapper.update:
UPDATE pt_renewal_warning_record SET follow_status = 1, follow_remark = #{followRemark} WHERE id = #{recordId} AND closed_at IS NULL
AND store_id IN (${storeIds})

UPDATE pt_renewal_warning_record SET follow_status = #{followStatus}, closed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{recordId} AND closed_at IS NULL
AND store_id IN (${storeIds})
